title: Seoul Station
tmdbOverview: In this animated prequel to "Train to Busan," a group of survivors deals with a zombie pandemic that unleashes itself in downtown Seoul.
synopsis: Seoul Station is a 2016 animation, horror and science fiction film from South Korea. It carries a 6.1 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (CH rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
